description: Sector-specific screening controls for UK maritime operators, shipping, ports, vessels, cargoes, marine safety, seafarer obligations, and MCA-regulated documentation.

metadata.scope: UK sector overlay controls for Maritime and Shipping. Intended to be used with uk_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official UK legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Ships and cargoes guidance and bulletins

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current UK laws, regulations, regulator notices, codes and guidance before production reliance.
UK rules may differ between England, Wales, Scotland and Northern Ireland; human reviewers must verify territorial applicability.

rules.title: MCA notice, certificate, or approval evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for MCA guidance, marine notices, certificates, approvals, permits, or inspection evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: Automated results are evidence-based screening signals only. A qualified UK legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and treatment of missing evidence before reliance.

rules.title: Cargo and dangerous-goods controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for cargo declarations, dangerous goods, stowage, carriage, or safety-bulletin evidence.

MGN 699 Merchant Shipping Carriage of Cargoes Regulations 2024
